evals.prompt: I have a Tauri v2 + React desktop app and I want to add auto-update functionality. The app should check for updates from GitHub Releases automatically and show a notification in the sidebar when a new version is available. Can you implement this?
evals.expected_output: Full implementation of auto-update: Cargo.toml dependencies, tauri.conf.json updater config, lib.rs plugin registration, useUpdater hook, Sidebar update bar UI, and App.tsx wiring.

evals.prompt: Help me set up a CI/CD pipeline for my Tauri React app. I need GitHub Actions to build for macOS, Linux, and Windows, sign the artifacts, and generate a latest.json file that the Tauri updater can consume.
evals.expected_output: A complete .github/workflows/release.yml with matrix build, tauri-action integration, latest.json generation job, and the build_merged_latest_json.cjs script.

evals.prompt: I want to add a non-intrusive update notification to my existing Tauri app. No modal dialogs — just a small notification bar below the logo in the sidebar that shows when an update is available, lets me download it, and restart. It should also handle errors gracefully.
evals.expected_output: An UpdateBar React component with states for available/downloading/ready/error, integrated into the existing Sidebar component with framer-motion animations.
